name: storyboard-monorepo
description: Root orchestrator for apps/web (Node, Railway), apps/voice-service (Spark-TTS, Modal), apps/piper-service (Piper TTS, Modal), and apps/alignment-service (WhisperX, local). No dependencies of its own.

scripts.start: trap 'kill 0' INT TERM EXIT; npm run dev:web & npm run dev:voice & npm run dev:align & wait
scripts.check: npm --prefix apps/web run check && apps/voice-service/venv/bin/python -m py_compile apps/voice-service/main.py && apps/piper-service/venv/bin/python -m py_compile apps/piper-service/main.py && apps/alignment-service/venv/bin/python -m py_compile apps/alignment-service/main.py
scripts.test: npm --prefix apps/web test && apps/voice-service/venv/bin/python -m pytest apps/voice-service/test_main.py && apps/piper-service/venv/bin/python -m pytest apps/piper-service/test_main.py && apps/alignment-service/venv/bin/python -m pytest apps/alignment-service/test_main.py
